title: Thai-Style Pork Curry
description: A rich and flavorful Thai-style curry made with tender pork and crunchy vegetables.
instructions: Heat oil in a large pan over medium-high heat.
Add the curry paste and cook for 1-2 minutes, until fragrant.
Add the pork and cook until browned on all sides, about 5 minutes.
Add the coconut milk, fish sauce, and brown sugar. Stir to combine.
Bring the mixture to a simmer, then reduce the heat to medium-low and cook for 20-25 minutes, or until the pork is tender.
Add the bell pepper, carrots, and onion to the pan. Cook for an additional 5-10 minutes, or until the vegetables are tender.
Stir in the fresh basil leaves.
Serve the curry hot over rice or noodles.
